description: Add homepage URL to the GitHub plugin so the side panel 'open tab' feature can open github.com when no matching tab exists.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/github && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add homepage to GitHub plugin
userStories.description: Add homepage: 'https://github.com' to both the GitHub plugin class and package.json opentabs field.
acceptanceCriteria: GitHubPlugin class has readonly homepage = 'https://github.com' after urlPatterns
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/github/src/index.ts (add homepage property to GitHubPlugin class)
- plugins/github/package.json (add homepage to opentabs field)

Context:
The GitHubPlugin class (src/index.ts) currently has:
```typescript
class GitHubPlugin extends OpenTabsPlugin {
  readonly name = 'github';
  readonly description = 'OpenTabs plugin for GitHub';
  override readonly displayName = 'GitHub';
  readonly urlPatterns = ['*://github.com/*'];
  readonly tools: ToolDefinition[] = [
```

The package.json opentabs field currently has:
```json
"opentabs": {
  "displayName": "GitHub",
  "description": "OpenTabs plugin for GitHub",
  "urlPatterns": ["*://github.com/*"]
}
```

Changes:
1. In src/index.ts, add after `readonly urlPatterns = ['*://github.com/*'];`:
```typescript
  readonly homepage = 'https://github.com';
```

2. In package.json opentabs field, add after urlPatterns:
```json
"homepage": "https://github.com"
```

Constraints:
- Do NOT change urlPatterns.
- Do NOT add excludePatterns — GitHub has no overlap with other plugins.
- The homepage field is optional in the SDK (OpenTabsPlugin.homepage?: string), so this is a non-breaking addition.
